faqs.question: What types of cockroaches are common in Freeport homes?
faqs.answer: Freeport properties most commonly experience German cockroach infestations in kitchens and bathrooms, American cockroaches in basements and sewer systems, and Oriental cockroaches in damp areas. Our treatment plans are customized to target the specific species infesting your property.
